title: Is there a Keyboard Shortcut to post updates?
excerpt: Hello, I am curious if anyone has come across a Keyboard Shortcut for posting an item update. After I finish typing out my message it would be nice to post that message with a quick keyboard shortcut. Shift + Enter seems…

posts.author: zach_a_king (Zachary King)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am curious if anyone has come across a Keyboard Shortcut for posting an item update. After I finish typing out my message it would be nice to post that message with a quick keyboard shortcut. Shift + Enter seems to make the most sense but does not work. I can hit TAB 4 times to highlight the blue “Update” button but that seems really tedious, as does having to take hands off the keyboard to hover and click the button. Anyone else experience this pain point?
Thanks,
Zach

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Zach,

I like this idea and can understand the current pain point you’re experiencing - I am sure you’re not alone! I encourage you to submit this as a feature request so that our community members can cast their vote to put greater emphasis on this need

posts.author: zach_a_king (Zachary King)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you Bianca, I will be sure to do that.
